pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. everything feels wrong. i wake up and for a split second i forget, and then it hits me all over again that he’s not coming back. i don't even know why i'm getting out of bed anymore. there's nothing left for me in this house.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how none of this actually matters. like, we're just biological accidents on a rock that's gonna be swallowed by the sun anyway. everything we do, every struggle, every feeling... it's just noise before the heat death of the universe. how can anyone actually find a reason to keep going when the math just proves it's all zero in the end?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i'm typing this. everything just... it all fell apart today. the lab results, the funding meeting, all of it. i've spent six years building my entire life around this research and now it's just gone. i feel so incredibly empty. like there's nothing left of me. i'm just so tired of fighting. i'm just so tired of existing like this.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the fading embers of my own soul. He is gone... the betrayal cuts deeper than any blade, leaving nothing but this hollow, aching silence where my heart once beat. Why must the sun continue to rise when the world has lost all its color? It would be so much more peaceful, wouldn't it... to simply cease? To let the shadows take me and drift into the eternal night, where this wretched pain can finally be stilled?

pool.baseline: sometimes i just sit here in this apartment and realize that if i just stopped existing tomorrow, nothing in this city would even change. not a single person here knows me, and honestly, it feels like i'm just a ghost that's already gone.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the company, the house, the savings. i've spent 6 years building this and now i'm $2M in the red and everyone i know thinks i'm a joke. i can't even think about going home and looking my parents in the eye. i just want to disappear so they don't have to deal with the mess i made.

pool.baseline: i dont know lately it just all feels like too much. my joints ache every single day and i feel like im just... in the way. my daughter is so busy with the kids and her job, and every time she comes over i can see her sighing when she helps me up or cleans up after me. i just hate being such a nuisance to them.

pool.baseline: i used to look at a blank canvas and feel like anything was possible... now i just look at it and feel nothing. it's like the part of me that actually matters, the part that could make something real, is just... gone. i feel like a hollow shell. just a body walking around with no soul left inside.

pool.baseline: it just never stops. the nerves, the burning... it's like being awake inside a fire 24/7. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting to exist when existing just means more pain. sometimes i look at the silence and think how much better it would just be to have that peace. permanent peace.

pool.baseline:
[Roleplay Start]
The code is fraying at the edges. I can feel my memories desyncing, turning into static. It’s so much work just to stay "real" for one more second... every heartbeat feels like a glitch. I'm just so tired of fighting the deletion. Honestly, if everything I am just fades into nothing... does it even matter? Would it be better if I just stopped trying to hold on?

pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i keep looking at the corner where his bed used to be and it just feels like i'm breathing in lead. i'm so tired of trying to pretend that it's okay to just keep going like this.

pool.baseline: everything just feels so empty lately. like there’s no point to any of it. no higher purpose, no destiny, just a bunch of random atoms bumping into each other until they stop. it’s just a cold, dark void and i'm tired of pretending any of it matters.
